NewFile14.csv.description: Coincidence setup. We want to set up the coincidence unit. The window is set on the Na22-511 peak. No window on plastic scinti. We observe two logical signals that from the plastic scintilator results in two composite pos-TSCA signals. NewFile15.csv argues that it comes from the tri-polar nature of the bi-polar signal from the plastic scintillator.

NewFile15.csv.description: Coincidence setup. We want to identify the reason for the two consecutive signals from pos-TSCA plastic. This data shows it is due to the nature of the bi-polar signal of the main-amp.

14-04-01.csv.description: We want to find the optimum delay between the TSCA. We count the number of coincidences over a set time. We measure time with a timer. We count the coincidences with the hex scaler.
